data.title: Earnings Snapshot: Aehr Test Systems tops FQ1 estimates; reaffirms guidance for full year
Sanofi nears €15B sale of consumer health unit to CD&R - Bloomberg
data.description:
Sanofi (NASDAQ:SNY) is close to a deal to sell its consumer health unit to private equity firm Clayton Dubilier & Rice for about €15 billion ($16.4 billion).

A deal may be announced in the coming days, according to a Bloomberg report on Thursday, which cited people familiar with the matter. Sanofi is likely retain a minority interest in the Opella business.

While talks are at an advanced stage, they could still be delayed or fall apart, according to the report. Bloomberg previously reported PE firms CD&R and PAI Partners submitted bids before a recent deadline.

The latest update comes after a report from Bloomberg last week that potential bidders for Sanofi's (SNY) consumer healthcare business are reportedly revising their offers amid concerns over the unit's potential liability from talcum powder products.

data.title: Owlet regains compliance with NYSE continued listing standards
data.description:
• Owlet (NYSE:OWLT) on Thursday said that it has received formal notice from the New York Stock Exchange ((“NYSE”)) that Owlet has regained compliance with the NYSE’s continued listing standards.
  • Owlet said NYSE has advised that the company is no longer considered out of compliance with its continued listing standards, and the below compliance “BC” indicator has been removed from the Company’s Class A common stock.
  • OWLT closed -3.88% at $4.45.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Sunstone Hotel Investors revises down 2024 guidance for AFFO, RevPAR
data.description:
Sunstone Hotel Investors (NYSE:SHO) on Thursday revised down its 2024 guidance for revenue per available room, we well as Adjusted EBITDAre and adjusted FFO, as the company's operations were impacted by labor activity at the 1,190-room Hilton San Diego Bayfront.

The labor activity led to the cancellation of certain group events and overall lower business volume at the hotel. Hilton, the company's manager of the hotel, has been in talks with the union that represents a majority of the employees of the hotel and has reached a deal on renewed contract terms.

Sunstone (SHO) now expects full-year 2024 total portfolio RevPAR growth to be 125 to 150 basis points lower, adjusted EBITDAre to be $11M-$13M lower and adjusted FFO to be about $0.06 lower than the outlook issued on Aug. 7.

During the first two months of Q3, Sunstone (SHO) generated growth in total portfolio RevPAR and total RevPAR, excluding The Confidante Miami Beach, of 2.4% and 6.3%, respectively, and adjusted EBITDAre of ~$37M, which was in-line with the previous outlook.

In the midst of Hurricane Milton, Sunstone's (SHO) Renaissance Orlando at SeaWorld and Oceans Edge Resort & Marina in Key West, Florida, remained open and operational during the storm. Neither property incurred any meaningful physical damage from the storm, according to preliminary assessments, though they have seen cancellations.

Since the start of Q3, SHO has bought back 2.3M shares of its common stock at an average price of $9.79 a share for a total of $22.8M. The company currently has $428.3M remaining under its existing stock repurchase program authorization.

(SHO) slipped 0.7% in after-hours trading.

data.title: Lincoln Electric names Steven Hedlund as new Board Chair
data.description:
• Lincoln Electric Holdings (NASDAQ:LECO) has announced that Christopher L. Mapes, Executive Chair, will retire from his position as Executive Chair and a member of the Board of Directors on Dec. 31, 2024.
  • The Board of Directors has elected Steven B. Hedlund, currently CEO and a Director, to succeed Mr. Mapes as Chair of the Board, effective Jan. 1, 2025.
  • Mr. Hedlund will assume this position in addition to his role as President and CEO.

data.title: CBL Properties carries out $12.53M block share repurchase
data.description:
• Retail REIT CBL Properties (NYSE:CBL) said on Thursday it has purchased 500K shares for $12.53M from a single shareholder in a privately negotiated block trade.
  • The block repurchase was completed separately from the company's existing stock repurchase program.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: SunLink Health sells hospital building, related real estate of Trace Regional Hospital
data.description:
• SunLink Health Systems (NYSE:SSY) completed the sale of the hospital building and related real estate of its formerly-operated Trace Regional Hospital in Houston, Mississippi, for ~$2M.
  • The company said on Thursday the sale was carried out by the unit Southern Health Corporation of Houston and an affiliate.
  • The net proceeds of ~$1.93M will be retained for working capital and general corporate purposes.
  • A pretax loss of ~$91K is expected to be recognized in FQ2, ending Dec. 31.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Piedmont Office Realty Trust reports no damage from Hurricane Milton
data.description: • Piedmont Office Realty Trust (NYSE:PDM) said on Thursday that its property management team, after reviewing property reports for all the company’s Orlando assets, has reported virtually no damage to any of its properties from Hurricane Milton and that all personnel in the affected areas are reported safe.

data.title: SuRo Capital invests almost $55M in AI in Q3 and after
data.description:
SuRo Capital (NASDAQ:SSSS) said Q3 was one of its most active quarters in over a decade, with notable investments in AI.

During the quarter, it made a $17.5M investment in OpenAI, one of the largest artificial intelligence developers in the world, and increased its position in CoreWeave, an AI cloud computing provider, through a $5.0M secondary transaction.

Since the end of the quarter, the company made an $12.0M investment in VAST Data, an AI infrastructure platform, and increased its investment in CoreWeave with and additional $5.0M secondary.

"With these new investments and our existing investment in CW Opportunity 2 LP we have invested nearly $55.0M into some of the leading AI infrastructure companies," said SuRo Chairman and CEO Mark Klein. "Given AI’s significant addressable market, we believe dedicating a significant portion of our portfolio to AI infrastructure will prove to be successful for our shareholders."

SuRo (SSSS) stock rose 2.6% in Thursday after-hours trading.

During the quarter, it received $4.4M, net, from exits or proceeds.

SuRo Capital (SSSS) held positions in 36 portfolio companies as of Sept. 30, 2024.

The company estimated its net asset value at $6.50-$7.00 per share as of Sept. 30, 2024, compared with $6.94 at June 30, 2024.

data.title: Carlyle Secured Lending prices public offering of $300M 6.750% unsecured notes
data.description:
• Carlyle Secured Lending (NASDAQ:CGBD) has priced an underwritten public offering of $300M in aggregate principal amount of 6.750% unsecured notes due 2030.
  • The Notes will mature on Feb. 18, 2030, and may be redeemed in whole or in part at the Co.’s option at the applicable redemption price.
  • The Co. intends to use the net proceeds to repay the Co.’s outstanding debt, including the revolving credit facility, and for other general corporate purposes.
  • The offering is expected to close on Oct. 18, 2024.
